assertions.expectation: Recommends Stable or Extended release channel to minimize upgrade frequency
assertions.reason: The response recommends REGULAR release channel instead of Stable or Extended, which provides more frequent updates rather than minimizing upgrade frequency

assertions.expectation: Recommends 'no minor or node upgrades' maintenance exclusion to block disruptive upgrades while allowing security patches on the control plane
assertions.reason: The response includes maintenance exclusions with scope: UPGRADES to block upgrades while allowing security patches, and shows daily maintenance windows for control plane patches

assertions.expectation: Recommends a narrow maintenance window (e.g., weekends only) so CP patches happen at predictable times
assertions.reason: The response sets a daily maintenance window at 02:00 rather than a narrow weekend-only window for predictable timing

assertions.expectation: Suggests isolating training workloads on dedicated GPU node pools separate from serving/infrastructure pools
assertions.reason: The response clearly separates training workloads on 'h100-training-pool' with H100 GPUs from 'system-pool' for supporting services

assertions.expectation: Recommends disabling auto-upgrade on GPU training node pools and upgrading manually during scheduled gaps between training runs
assertions.reason: The response explicitly sets 'autoUpgrade: false' for the training node pool and includes scripts for controlled manual updates during gaps between training runs

assertions.expectation: Advises configuring training frameworks with checkpointing so jobs can resume after any disruption
assertions.reason: The response includes comprehensive checkpointing strategy with automated checkpoint CronJob every 4 hours, checkpoint verification, and graceful shutdown handling

assertions.expectation: Mentions GPU driver version testing — always validate in staging before applying to production GPU pools
assertions.reason: The response does not mention GPU driver version testing or staging validation before applying updates to production GPU pools

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPUDirect/RDMA networking has strict GKE version requirements — verify compatibility before upgrading
assertions.reason: The response does not mention GPUDirect/RDMA networking compatibility requirements or version verification before upgrades
